title: Regex compiled on every call in parse_mentions/parse_hashtags/autolink
description: posting.rs parse_mentions() (line 402), parse_hashtags() (line 425), autolink_bare_urls() (line 448) each compile a regex::Regex::new() on every invocation. These are called on every post create/edit and every inbound Note. The fix is trivial: promote to LazyLock<Regex> statics (like extract_fediverse_links already does on line 381).
